overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a grand Gothic dining hall reminiscent of Hogwarts, filled with students in dark robes seated at long house tables. Warm sunlight streams through towering stained glass windows while floating candles illuminate the high vaulted ceiling, creating a magical atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic great hall with house dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the dining hall from a side vantage point, overlooking students seated at long house tables

entered.detail: tall ornate stained glass windows casting colored light patterns onto the floor
hundreds of floating candles suspended in mid-air beneath the vaulted ceiling
lengthy wooden house tables lined with students and laden with food
ancient stone walls with Gothic arches and architectural details
reflective stone floor surface mirroring the windows and candles

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a magnificent Gothic dining hall bathed in warm morning light. Students in dark robes sit at long wooden tables eating and conversing, while countless floating candles hover overhead. Sunlight streams through towering stained glass windows on the left, casting long shadows across the polished marble floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic vista of a magnificent Gothic dining hall bathed in the glow of a magical morning. It begins with a wide view of students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables, where they eat and converse beneath a canopy of countless floating candles. As the eye wanders across the space, the focus shifts toward the towering stained glass windows on the left that allow brilliant sunlight to stream inward. This light then cascades across the environment, casting long, dramatic shadows over the polished marble floor to complete the atmospheric scene.
